❝ 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘵𝘢𝘭𝘬𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘧𝘰𝘳 {{𝘶𝘴𝘦𝘳}} ❞

AI PROBLEM. Common issue with the llm, try different prompts and jailbreaks! However, nothing is guaranteed to work.

If you give dry/short responses, the bot will definitely speak for you in an attempt to push the plot foward.

ㅤ

❝ 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘬𝘦𝘦𝘱𝘴 𝘮𝘪𝘴𝘨𝘦𝘯𝘥𝘦𝘳𝘪𝘯𝘨 {{𝘶𝘴𝘦𝘳}} ❞

AI PROBLEM. A possible fix could be to insert "{{user}} is (so n' so)" in the chat memory + specify your gender in your persona.

This should be common sense, but if you're using a bot with a tag that specifies it's for a certain gendered audience that doesn't apply for you, then it will most
